case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. DAMON APPIGNANI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED JUL-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APPIGNANI, DAMON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED JUL-19-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT APPIGNANI, DAMON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT APPIGNANI, DAMON

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT APPIGNANI, DAMON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPIGNANI, DAMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1169 MARKET STREET, #312 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT BY KATHRYN QUETEL, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
